en: We are here at Pixar Animation Studios in Emeryville, California.
ko: 우리는 캘리포니아 에머리빌에 있는 픽사 애니메이션 스튜디오에 있어.

en: We're about to go inside to meet Anna,.
Who is one of the character designers of Hoppers.
ko: 그녀는 호퍼스의 캐릭터 디자이너 중 한 명이야.

en: How do you incorporate the personality of the voice actor.
ko: 목소리 배우의 개성을 궁극적인 캐릭터에 어떻게 녹여내?

en: I could show you what I do by trying to draw you as a beaver,.
If you want to see how that would look.
This is Michelle as a beaver.
ko: 거기 세부사항을 넣으려고 해, 아이라이너, 머리, 재킷.

en: Trying to get some details in there, the eyeliner, the hair, the jacket.
